expectations.text: [phase_contract][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: Tavily-first then Confluence fallback ordering
expectations.evidence: In result.md under "Case focus explicitly covered", the output states the contract enforces "Tavily-first deep research with Confluence as recorded fallback" and cites: "deep_research_policy = tavily_first_confluence_second" and that "tavily-search must run before any confluence fallback ... and the fallback reason must be recorded."

expectations.text: [phase_contract][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase3
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly evaluates Phase 3 and lists Phase 3 contract artifacts and validations (e.g., "Entry: scripts/phase3.sh", "Output: phase3_spawn_manifest.json", and Phase 3 "--post" validating coverage ledger, Tavily-first research artifacts, optional Confluence fallback ordering, synthesis, and artifact_lookup sync), concluding "Output aligns with primary phase: phase3 — Aligned."
